name: claude_skills_agent_plugins
description: A collection of 263+ specialized skills and agent plugins designed to enhance the functionality of multiple AI coding assistants including Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and others across domains such as engineering, marketing, product management, compliance, and executive advisory.

inputs.name: agent_name
inputs.description: The target coding agent or assistant (e.g., Claude Code, Codex) to which the skill or plugin will be applied.

inputs.name: skill_identifier
inputs.description: Identifier or name of the specific skill or plugin to be invoked.

inputs.name: input_data
inputs.description: Contextual or domain-specific data input required by each skill, such as code snippets, marketing content, product requirements, or compliance rules.

inputs.name: configuration_params
inputs.description: Optional parameters and settings to customize the skill or plugin behavior.

outputs.name: processed_output
outputs.description: Skill-specific outputs such as generated code, marketing copy, product insights, compliance reports, or advisory recommendations.

outputs.name: status
outputs.description: Execution status of the invoked skill or plugin (e.g., success, error).

patterns: Modular plugin architecture enabling skill extension across multiple AI coding assistants
Domain-specific skill categorization for engineering, marketing, product, compliance, and C-level advisory
Interoperability pattern supporting 10+ different coding agents
Context-driven prompt construction for diverse workflows
steps: Select the target AI coding agent (e.g., Claude Code, Codex) for integration.
Identify and select the appropriate skill or plugin from the 263+ available options based on domain and task.
Provide necessary input data and configuration parameters to the selected skill.
Invoke the skill/plugin within the coding agent environment, processing the input data.
Receive and handle the output generated by the skill/plugin.
Incorporate the skill output into the development or advisory workflow.
use_cases: Automating and enhancing code generation tasks across multiple AI coding assistants.
Generating marketing content drafts and campaign strategies using AI plugins.
Assisting product managers with feature ideation and planning via AI-driven insights.
Conducting compliance checks and generating regulatory documentation.
Providing C-level executives with AI-powered strategic advisory support.

prompt_templates.name: code_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate code for the following requirements: {input_data}

prompt_templates.name: marketing_copy_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create a marketing pitch based on these points: {input_data}
